description: CompositionBlue capris made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband and drawstring, graphic print on the left side below the waistband and a panel on the hem with the brand logo appliquedFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironThese capris from urban yoga have a breathable fabric, and a soft waistband. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and a comfortable pair of shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
